=> 64, ], 'MediaSourceConfig' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'MediaUriSecretArn', 'MediaUriType', ], 'members' => [ 'MediaUriSecretArn' => [ 'shape' => 'MediaUriSecretArn', ], 'MediaUriType' => [ 'shape' => 'MediaUriType', ], ], ], 'MediaStorageConfiguration' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'Status', ], 'members' => [ 'StreamARN' => [ 'shape' => 'ResourceARN', ], 'Status' => [ 'shape' => 'MediaStorageConfigurationStatus', ], ], ], 'MediaStorageConfigurationStatus' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'ENABLED', 'DISABLED', ], ], 'MediaType' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 128, 'min' => 1, 'pattern' => '[\\w\\-\\.\\+]+/[\\w\\-\\.\\+]+(,[\\w\\-\\.\\+]+/[\\w\\-\\.\\+]+)*', ], 'MediaUriSecretArn' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 2048, 'min' => 20, 'pattern' => 'arn:[a-z\\d-]+:secretsmanager:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]+:secret:[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+', 'sensitive' => true, ], 'MediaUriType' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'RTSP_URI', 'FILE_URI', ], ], 'MessageTtlSeconds' => [ 'type' => 'integer', 'max' => 120, 'min' => 5, ], 'NextToken' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 1024, 'min' => 0, 'pattern' => '[a-zA-Z0-9+/=]*', ], 'NoDataRetentionException' 'ResourceTags' => [ 'type' => 'map', 'key' => [ 'shape' => 'TagKey', ], 'value' => [ 'shape' => 'TagValue', ], 'max' => 50, 'min' => 1, ], 'SamplingInterval' => [ 'type' => 'integer', ], 'ScheduleConfig' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'ScheduleExpression', 'DurationInSeconds', ], 'members' => [ 'ScheduleExpression' => [ 'shape' => 'ScheduleExpression', ], 'DurationInSeconds' => [ 'shape' => 'DurationInSeconds', ], ], ], 'ScheduleExpression' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 100, 'min' => 11, 'pattern' => '[^\\n]{11,100}', ],
